current_wind.description: Moderate wind from West, gusts to 9.4 mph

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the right (approx. 2 o'clock)

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Moderate crosswind from right. Consider RHFH or a controlled hyzer. Keep the flight plate from being exposed to the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind is from the right, so a forehand will fight it effectively. Aim for a clean release.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind from the left works with the natural fade. Should be manageable. Focus on smooth release.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind from the left will push against the forehand. Keep it clean and controlled.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind from the left works with the natural fade. Should be manageable. Focus on smooth release.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind from the left will push against the forehand. Keep it clean and controlled.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the right (approx. 4 o'clock)

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Strong crosswind from the right. A hyzer is essential to keep the disc from turning over. Keep the flight plate from being exposed to the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind from the right. A clean forehand should manage this wind effectively. Aim for accuracy.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind from the left works with the natural fade. This should be manageable. Focus on a smooth, controlled throw.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind from the left will push against the forehand. Keep it clean and controlled.

wind_info.description: Moderate wind from the WNW (approx. 11 o'clock)

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Headwind. Use an overstable disc to fight the wind and maintain a straight flight path.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Headwind. An overstable disc will perform well here. Focus on a clean, powerful release.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Headwind. An overstable disc is recommended to counter the wind's force and maintain control.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Headwind. Utilize an overstable disc to achieve a predictable flight. Execute with confidence.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind from the right. A forehand will effectively fight this wind. Aim for a smooth, controlled release.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Right-to-left wind. The natural fade goes left, working with the wind. A controlled backhand should be manageable.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind from the right will push against the forehand. Keep it clean and controlled.
